app.title: Black Hole: Devour
app.subtitle: MVP · Newtonian field sim; GR visuals are metaphors
app.massHint: · pull debris in 1/r² gravity; horizon is the score sink

current.size: Now: ×{{mul}} vs base horizon; at this window size horizon ≈ {{px}} px
current.gravity: Now: ×{{mul}} vs base gravity zone; radius ≈ {{px}} px (never below the horizon; pull fades smoothly past the zone edge).
current.disk: Now: disk MP multiplier ×{{mul}} (relative to base without other branches)
current.jets: Now: jets level {{level}} (accretion-linked bursts: ×1.8 field MP and inward impulse).
current.lensing: Now: rare debris (high-MP type) weight ×{{mul}} vs base without lensing.
current.hawking: Now: stylized passive influx ≈ {{mps}} MP/s (not a physical luminosity; scales with mass and level).

lock.disk: Available from the start (branch A, phase 2).
lock.efficiency: Requires sum of all branch levels ≥ {{need}} (yours: {{sum}}).
lock.jets: Requires sum of all branch levels ≥ {{need}} (yours: {{sum}}).
lock.lensing: Requires sum of all branch levels ≥ {{need}} (yours: {{sum}}).
lock.hawking: Requires sum of all branch levels ≥ {{need}} (yours: {{sum}}).

gravity.name: Gravity radius
gravity.effect: +11% zone radius per level (multiplicative). Jet bursts require accretion disk levels; zone edge uses a smooth pull falloff.

efficiency.name: Efficiency
efficiency.effect: +3.5% global MP and +2.2% pull strength per level (multiplicative).

jets.name: Relativistic jets
jets.effect: Accretion-driven bursts: ~20s of ×1.8 field MP and an inward kick; chance grows with disk level and jet branch level.

lensing.name: Gravitational lensing
lensing.effect: Each level increases spawn weight for rare high-MP debris.

hawking.name: Hawking radiation
hawking.effect: Stylized passive MP/s for progression — orders of magnitude faster than real Hawking power for astrophysical holes.

planet.title: Planet development

astro.hzIn: Orbit in a rough habitable-zone band for this star class (schematic 0–100 scale).
astro.hzOut: Outside that habitable-zone band on the schematic scale.
astro.tidalLock: Tidal locking is plausible at this proximity and gravity proxy.

planet.lifeAutoNote: Life emergence fills automatically while all six stats stay in the comfort band — MP boost only advances civilization stages.
planet.accelInfo: Acceleration step: +{{seconds}}s (toward next stage: {{next}}s), multiplier ×{{multiplier}}, deviation sum {{deviation}}.
planet.ecoGate: Ecosystem: all six stats in {{low}}–{{high}} unlocks life emergence.
planet.ecoPending: Balance parameters first; the life timer stays hidden until the ecosystem is in band.
planet.lifeProgress: Progress: {{pct}}% (target ≈ {{totalMin}} min game time at ×1 speed)
planet.lifeBorn: Life awakened: the biosphere slowly depletes — MP for a hole swallow drifts down over time.
planet.civTeaser: Next: space age, colonies, elemental beats — later milestones.

hover.title: {{name}}
hover.ecoUnstable: Ecosystem unstable — align all six parameters.
hover.lifeGate: Ecosystem ready, but the planet is immature — life begins from the «Mature planet» stage (3).
hover.lifeBorn: Life present — swallow MP drops while the biosphere depletes.
hover.civTier: Civilization: tier {{tier}}/{{max}} — tribute ships bring passive MP.
hover.swallow: Rough MP if the hole swallows it now: +{{mp}} MP
